ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: TilliT needs access to your camera to take photos to send in messages.
ios.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TilliT needs access to your photo library to select photos to send in messages.
ios.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: TilliT needs access to your photo library to save received images.
ios.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: TilliT uses Face ID to protect access to your encrypted messages.
ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: TilliT needs access to your microphone to record voice messages.
